name: Ping
description: ICMP Ping 拨测，检测主机可达性、丢包率、RTT 延迟等
toml_template:
[[instances]]
targets = [{{range $i, $v := split .targets ","}}{{if $i}}, {{end}}"{{trim $v}}"{{end}}]
count = {{.count}}
timeout = "{{.timeout}}"
interval = "{{.interval}}"

[instances.connectivity]
severity = "Critical"

[instances.packet_loss]
warn_ge = 1.0
critical_ge = 50.0
